overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in traditional Japanese attire walking through a dark mountainous forest at night. The character crosses wooden bridges, passes a campfire and stone grave markers, and approaches a distant lit settlement under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge in mountain shrine area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge toward a mountain cliff face

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with railings spanning a gap in the mountain terrain
traditional Japanese stone lantern with warm orange flame
steep rocky cliff with wooden structures built into the mountainside
simple wooden post and rail fence along bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wooden bridge in a dark mountain setting, passing a lit stone lantern. The bridge leads toward a steep cliff face with wooden structures visible in the distance under a night sky.

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto dirt ground approaching a burning campfire
passes the campfire and enters a clearing with stone structures

agents.ego_description: walking past a burning campfire in a stone-lined clearing toward a distant torii gate

entered.detail: bonfire with orange flames surrounded by stones in a clearing
circular arrangement of stones containing the campfire
traditional Japanese shrine gate silhouetted against the dark mountain

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bridge and walks through a clearing containing a burning campfire surrounded by stones. A stone torii gate stands in the distance as the character passes the fire and continues onto a dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone grave markers

events.description: moving away from campfire into darker moonlit forest area
distant settlement lights become visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding dirt path past stone grave markers and lanterns toward distant lights

entered.detail: small stone monuments and grave markers lining the forest path
traditional stone lanterns placed along the trail
tall pine trees surrounding the path on both sides
wooden signpost with warning text visible on the left side of path
warm orange lights of a village visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a forest path lined with stone grave markers and lanterns. The campfire fades behind as distant settlement lights become visible through the trees. A wooden warning sign appears on the left side of the path.

events.description: approaching wooden structures and stone walls of the settlement

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the lit settlement with visible wooden buildings and stone walls

entered.detail: traditional wooden structures with lit windows becoming visible
stone retaining walls along the path edges
tiled roofs of village buildings silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the settlement as the distant lights grow closer and resolve into wooden buildings with lit windows and stone walls. The forest gives way to the edge of a traditional village with visible rooftops and structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark mountain forest that gradually opens into a lit traditional settlement. It begins with the character crossing a wooden bridge past a glowing stone lantern, moving toward a steep cliff face and distant wooden structures under a night sky. As the character leaves the bridge, the scene shifts into a clearing centered around a burning campfire and a distant stone torii gate before transitioning onto a dirt path. The camera then follows the character past a line of stone grave markers and lanterns, passing a wooden warning sign as the campfire fades and distant lights emerge through the trees. Finally, the forest gives way to the edge of a village, where the distant glows resolve into wooden buildings with lit windows and stone walls.
